docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KRIEG, CHRISTINE HEARING SET FOR MAR-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, MELISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRIEG, CHRISTINE $734.48 PRINCIPAL, $62.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $796.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2010 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, MELISSA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2010 BY SAMUEL K. FENG. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,424.88 FILED BY CHAPMAN, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT KRIEG, CHRISTINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED NOV-30-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KRIEG, CHRISTINE

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY CHRISTINE KRIEG IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL PAY JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $100.00 OR MORE ON THE 1ST DAY OF EVERY MONTH COMMENCING APRIL 1, 2010 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. ON THE FILING OF AN AFFIDAVIT OR DECLARATION BY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR SHOWING THAT ANY PAYMENT DUE HAS NOT BEEN PAID, THIS ORDER SHALL BE SET ASIDE AND THE CLERK MAY ISSUE A WRIT OF EXECUTION IMMEDIATELY, WITHOUT FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ONLY. COMMISSIONER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
